appliedUpdates.description: Added `test_go_ebpf` and `lint_go_ebpf` commands so scrutiny and workers can run ebpf-scoped validation explicitly.
Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to reflect that `notify` is implemented (no longer planned), including behavior and test coverage notes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Narrow validator guidance to feature scope (e.g., ebpf-only features should not require `internal/af` validation) and reference services commands that match fulfills assertions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ppid-enrichment review observed validator mismatch and worker transcript shows unrelated `internal/af` validation attempts before ebpf work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make TDD-red-phase adherence explicit in completion criteria (or relax requirement) so transcript order and `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` stay consistent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: python-notify-integration review found code edits before test creation despite skill step requiring tests-first, while handoff reported procedure followed.
